title: Blow-up, decay, and convergence to equilibrium for focusing damped cubic Klein-Gordon and Duffing equations
summary: We study long-time dynamics of the damped focusing cubic Klein-Gordon equation on a compact three-dimensional Riemannian manifold, together with its space-independent reduction, the damped focusing Duffing equation. Under the geometric control condition on the damping and an assumption on the set of stationary solutions, we establish a sharp trichotomy for initial data with energy slightly above that of the ground state: every solution either blows up in finite time, decays exponentially to zero, or converges to a ground state. We provide a complete classification of the Duffing dynamics above the energy of the constant solution, use it to construct Klein-Gordon solutions realising each of the three behaviours, and derive a simple spectral criterion ensuring that the ground states are nonconstant--and hence that the solutions realising the three regimes lie above the ground-state energy.

AI.tldr: 建立了阻尼聚焦Klein-Gordon方程在能量略高于基态时的尖锐三分法：解要么有限时间爆破，要么指数衰减到零，要么收敛到基态。
AI.motivation: 研究三维紧致黎曼流形上阻尼聚焦立方Klein-Gordon方程及其空间无关简化（阻尼聚焦Duffing方程）的长时间动力学行为，特别关注能量略高于基态时的解的分类问题。
AI.techniques: 几何控制条件、谱分析、能量方法、稳定性分析、Duffing方程完全分类、构造性方法。
AI.main_theorems: 在几何控制条件和驻解集假设下，建立了初始数据能量略高于基态时的尖锐三分法：解要么有限时间爆破，要么指数衰减到零，要么收敛到基态；完全分类了Duffing方程在常数解能量以上的动力学；构造了实现三种行为的Klein-Gordon解；给出了基态非常数的简单谱判据。
AI.significance: 为阻尼聚焦非线性波动方程的长时间行为提供了完整的分类理论，建立了能量略高于基态时的精确动力学图像，对理解非线性波动方程的稳定性、爆破和渐近行为有重要理论意义。

title: A New approach for the unsteady Stokes equations with time fractional derivative in Bounded Domains
summary: In this work, we introduce a novel variational framework for the study of the unsteady Stokes equations in a bounded open Lipschitz domain in R^n, involving a Caputo fractional derivative in time. The nonlocal nature of the fractional derivative presents significant analytical challenges, making classical methods such as the Faedo-Galerkin approach inadequate in their standard form for a full analysis of the problem. To address these difficulties, we develop and rigorously analyze new functional spaces specifically designed for the fractional setting. These spaces allow us to reformulate weak solutions in a manner consistent with the fractional dynamics, thereby enabling the successful implementation of a generalized Galerkin scheme. Our formulation not only extends the classical theory but also provides a foundation for the study of broader classes of fractional partial differential equations in fluid mechanics and related areas.

AI.tldr: 提出了研究含时间Caputo分数阶导数的非定常Stokes方程的新变分框架和函数空间
AI.motivation: 分数阶导数的非局部性质给有界Lipschitz域中非定常Stokes方程的分析带来显著挑战，经典方法如Faedo-Galerkin方法无法直接应用
AI.techniques: 为分数阶设置专门设计的新的函数空间，广义Galerkin格式，变分框架重构
AI.main_theorems: 建立了适用于分数阶动力学的弱解重构方法，成功实现了广义Galerkin格式的严格分析
AI.significance: 扩展了经典理论，为流体力学及相关领域中更广泛的分数阶偏微分方程研究提供了基础

title: Global stability analysis of an age-structured model assessing the impact of Radopholus similis on banana-plantain production
summary: In this paper, we develop and analyse a mathematical model to investigate the interactions between banana and plantain plants and the nematode \textit{Radopholus similis}, a pest species occurring in banana plantations worldwide, with particularly high prevalence in Central Africa. The model incorporates root infection and mortality rates as functions of root age, providing a more realistic representation of the infection dynamics. We prove that the model is well-defined by establishing the existence and uniqueness of a mild solution using the theory of semi-groups for nonlinear evolutionary systems. We further show that the solution is positive and bounded. Under additional assumptions on the regularity of the parameters and the data, we prove that the mild solution is indeed a classical solution. We then study the asymptotic behaviour of the solution by deriving a threshold parameter \(\mathcal{N}\), which determines the stability of the disease-free equilibrium. Finally, we perform a numerical analysis of the proposed model using the semi-implicit Euler method. The biological consistency of the numerical solutions is established, and simulations are carried out to illustrate the theoretical results and estimate yield losses caused by nematodes. We conclude the numerical analysis by implementing an impulsive control strategy, which confirms that the use of nematicides - whether chemical or biological - helps to mitigate the devastating effects of nematodes and enhances crop yield.

AI.tldr: 建立了香蕉/大蕉与根腐线虫相互作用的年龄结构数学模型，证明了适定性和阈值稳定性，并通过数值模拟验证了杀线虫剂控制策略的有效性。
AI.motivation: 研究香蕉和大蕉种植园中根腐线虫（Radopholus similis）的感染动力学，该害虫在全球香蕉种植园普遍存在，在中非地区尤为严重，需要建立更精确的数学模型来理解感染机制和评估控制策略。
AI.techniques: 使用半群理论处理非线性演化系统，证明温和解的存在唯一性；建立阈值参数分析渐近行为；采用半隐式欧拉方法进行数值分析；实施脉冲控制策略模拟杀线虫剂应用。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 模型适定性：证明温和解的存在唯一性、正性和有界性；2. 正则性：在参数和数据正则性假设下证明温和解是经典解；3. 稳定性分析：推导阈值参数N确定无病平衡点的稳定性。
AI.significance: 为香蕉线虫病提供了首个包含根年龄结构的数学模型，将数学分析与农业实践结合，为评估杀线虫剂（化学或生物）控制策略提供了理论框架，有助于减少作物损失和提高产量。

title: Large-time behaviour for coupled systems of Lotka-Volterra-type Fokker-Planck equations
summary: We study a system of Fokker-Planck equations recently introduced to describe the temporal evolution of statistical distributions of population densities with predator-prey interactions. At the macroscopic level, the system recovers a Lotka-Volterra model and defines an explicit family of equilibrium densities that depend on the form of the diffusion coefficient. By introducing Energy-type distances, we rigorously establish exponential convergence to equilibrium in appropriate homogeneous Sobolev spaces, with a rate explicitly determined by the dissipative contribution of the interaction term. The analysis highlights the intrinsic energy dissipation mechanism governing the dynamics and clarifies how the evolution of expected quantities determines the emergence of a stable equilibrium configuration. This approach provides a new perspective on the convergence to equilibrium for problems with time-dependent coefficients.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过引入能量型距离，严格证明了捕食者-猎物相互作用的Fokker-Planck系统在适当齐次Sobolev空间中指数收敛到平衡态。
AI.motivation: 研究捕食者-猎物相互作用的种群密度统计分布随时间演化的Fokker-Planck系统，该系统在宏观层面恢复Lotka-Volterra模型，旨在理解系统如何收敛到平衡态以及时间依赖系数问题的收敛机制。
AI.techniques: 引入能量型距离（Energy-type distances），在齐次Sobolev空间中进行分析，利用相互作用项的耗散贡献确定收敛速率，强调系统内在的能量耗散机制。
AI.main_theorems: 严格建立了系统在适当齐次Sobolev空间中指数收敛到平衡态，收敛速率由相互作用项的耗散贡献明确确定，并构造了依赖于扩散系数形式的平衡密度族。
AI.significance: 为具有时间依赖系数的问题提供了收敛到平衡态的新视角，阐明了期望量的演化如何决定稳定平衡构型的出现，深化了对捕食者-猎物系统动力学和统计分布演化的理解。

title: Exponential Decays of Steklov Eigenfunctions for the Magnetic Laplacian
summary: Consider the Dirichlet-to-Neumann map $Λ_β$ associated with the Schrödinger operator $(D+β\A)^2$ with a magnetic potential in a bounded Lipschitz domain $Ω$, where $β>1$ is the field strength parameter. Assume that the magnetic field $\B=\nabla \times \A$ is of finite type. We show that if $β>β_0$, the ground state for $Λ_β$ decays exponentially away from a neighborhood of the subset of $\partialΩ$, on which $\B$ vanishes to the maximal order.

AI.tldr: 证明了在强磁场极限下，Dirichlet-to-Neumann映射的基态在磁场消失最大阶的子集邻域外呈指数衰减
AI.motivation: 研究带磁势的薛定谔算子的Dirichlet-to-Neumann映射在强磁场极限下的渐近行为，特别关注基态在边界上的局域化现象
AI.techniques: 使用磁场有限型条件，分析强磁场极限下的渐近展开，研究Dirichlet-to-Neumann算子的谱性质
AI.main_theorems: 当磁场强度参数β大于某个阈值β₀时，Dirichlet-to-Neumann映射Λ_β的基态在磁场B消失到最大阶的边界子集邻域外呈指数衰减
AI.significance: 揭示了强磁场下量子系统边界效应的局域化特性，为理解磁场对边界值问题的影响提供了新的理论框架

title: Segregated Solutions to Critical Elliptic Systems in High Dimensions ($N \geq 5$)
summary:
We study the existence of multiple segregated solutions to the critical coupled Schrödinger system
  $-Δu_1 = K_1(| y|) \lvert u_{1}\rvert^{2^{*}-2}u_{1}+β\lvert u_{2}\rvert^{\frac{2^{*}}{2}}\lvert u_{1}\rvert^{\frac{2^{*}}{2}-2}u_{1}, -Δu_{2} = K_2(\lvert y\rvert) \lvert u_{2}\rvert^{2^{*}-2}u_{2}+β\lvert u_{1}\rvert^{\frac{2^{*}}{2}}\lvert u_{2}\rvert^{\frac{2^{*}}{2}-2}u_{2}, y\in\mathbb R^N, u_{1},u_{2}\geq0,u_{1},u_{2}\in C_{0}(\mathbb R^{N})\cap D^{1,2}(\mathbb R^N),$
  with $N \geq 5$, $2^* = \frac{2N}{N-2}$, radial potentials $K_1, K_2 > 0$,and repulsive coupling $β< 0$.Under the assumption that $K_1$ and $K_2$ attain local maxima at distinct radii $r_0 \ne ρ_0$ with precise asymptotic expansions near these points, we prove the existence of infinitely many non-radial segregated solutions $(u_{1,k}, u_{2,k})$ for all sufficiently large integers $k$. These solutions exhibit multiple bumps concentrating on two separate circles of radius $r_0$ and $ρ_0$ respectively. Moreover, each component develops a ``dead core'' near the concentration points of the other. The proof overcomes the sublinear and non-smooth nature of the coupling term ($2^*/2 -1 < 1$) by constructing a tailored complete metric space and combining a finite-dimensional reduction with a novel tail minimization argument.

AI.tldr: 证明了临界耦合薛定谔系统在排斥耦合下存在无穷多个非径向分离解，其分量分别集中在两个不同半径的圆周上。
AI.motivation: 研究临界耦合薛定谔系统中排斥耦合参数β<0时多重分离解的存在性，这类系统在Bose-Einstein凝聚、非线性光学等物理问题中有重要应用。
AI.techniques: 构造了定制的完备度量空间，结合有限维约化和新颖的尾部最小化论证，克服了耦合项次线性和非光滑性的困难。
AI.main_theorems: 当K₁和K₂在不相等的半径r₀≠ρ₀处取得局部极大值且具有精确渐近展开时，对所有充分大的整数k，系统存在无穷多个非径向分离解(u₁ₖ,u₂ₖ)。
AI.significance: 首次在临界指数和排斥耦合下证明了多重分离解的存在性，为理解耦合非线性系统的模式形成提供了新的数学框架。

title: Bounded Solutions of Lane-Emden-Fowler system in 2D Exterior Domains
summary: This research investigates the Lane-Emden-Fowler sublinear system in two-dimensional exterior domains, motivated by the corresponding scalar cases studied by Constantin (1997) and Yin (2004). Utilizing Liouville transformation, Schauder's fixed point theorem and sub-supersolution method, we establish the existence of bounded positive solutions under suitable conditions on the functions involved. As citations in the papers by Constantin (1997) and Yin (2004) show, this work is the first to consider the system case.

AI.tldr: 首次研究了二维外部区域中Lane-Emden-Fowler次线性系统的有界正解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究二维外部区域中的Lane-Emden-Fowler次线性系统，该问题在标量情形下已由Constantin (1997)和Yin (2004)研究，但系统情形尚未被考虑
AI.techniques: 使用Liouville变换、Schauder不动点定理和上下解方法
AI.main_theorems: 在适当条件下建立了有界正解的存在性定理
AI.significance: 首次将标量情形的结果推广到系统情形，扩展了Lane-Emden-Fowler方程的研究范围，为相关非线性椭圆系统提供了新的存在性理论

title: Gradient Flows of Potential Energies in the Geometry of Sinkhorn Divergences
summary: We analyze the gradient flow of a potential energy in the space of probability measures when we substitute the optimal transport geometry with a geometry based on Sinkhorn divergences, a debiased version of entropic optimal transport. This gradient flow appears formally as the limit of the minimizing movement scheme, a.k.a. JKO scheme, when the squared Wasserstein distance is substituted by the Sinkhorn divergence. We prove well-posedness and stability of the flow, and that, in the long term, the energy always converges to its minimal value. The analysis is based on a change of variable to study the flow in a Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space, in which the evolution is no longer a gradient flow but described by a monotone operator. Under a restrictive assumption we prove the convergence of our modified JKO scheme towards this flow as the time step vanishes. We also provide numerical illustrations of the intriguing properties of this newly defined gradient flow.

AI.tldr: 提出并分析基于Sinkhorn散度的概率测度空间梯度流，替代传统最优传输几何，建立其适定性和稳定性理论。
AI.motivation: 传统最优传输理论中的Wasserstein梯度流（JKO格式）在计算上具有挑战性，而Sinkhorn散度作为熵正则化最优传输的修正版本，具有更好的计算性质。本文旨在研究用Sinkhorn散度替代Wasserstein距离时，概率测度空间中势能梯度流的数学理论。
AI.techniques: 采用最小运动格式（JKO格式）的变体，通过变量变换将问题转化到再生核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）中分析，利用单调算子理论，结合数值模拟验证理论结果。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了基于Sinkhorn散度的梯度流的适定性和稳定性，建立了能量长期收敛到最小值的理论，在限制性假设下证明了修正JKO格式收敛到该梯度流。
AI.significance: 为计算最优传输提供了新的理论框架，将熵正则化最优传输的数值优势与梯度流理论结合，为机器学习、图像处理和统计物理中的概率测度演化问题提供了新工具。

title: On $(p,N)$-Laplace multivalued equations with critical exponential nonlinearity in $\mathbb{R}^N$
summary: In this paper, we study the existence of nonnegative solutions for a class of multivalued $(p,N)$-Laplace problems having discontinuous nonlinearity with critical exponential growth in $\mathbb{R}^N$. To demonstrate the existence results, we utilized variational methods for non-differentiable functions.

AI.tldr: 研究具有临界指数增长的非线性多值$(p,N)$-拉普拉斯问题非负解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究$\mathbb{R}^N$中具有临界指数增长的不连续非线性多值$(p,N)$-拉普拉斯问题，这类问题在非光滑分析和变分方法中具有挑战性
AI.techniques: 非光滑函数的变分方法，针对非可微泛函的临界点理论，处理多值算子和不连续非线性项的技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明了具有临界指数增长的多值$(p,N)$-拉普拉斯问题非负解的存在性定理
AI.significance: 扩展了临界指数增长问题的存在性理论，为处理不连续非线性项和多值算子提供了新的变分框架

title: An improved existence theorem for rigid nonlinearly elastic plates
summary: A plate is rigid if its admissible displacement fields inducing vanishing two-dimensional strain tensors must vanish. We prove that the nonlinear model of Kirchhoff-Love for such a plate has a solution for any applied forces and boundary conditions. Then we give sufficient conditions on the data ensuring the rigidity of the plate. Together, these results substantially generalize an existence theorem by Rabier whereby the plate is assumed to be clamped on its entire boundary.

AI.tldr: 证明了Kirchhoff-Love非线性板模型在任意载荷和边界条件下解的存在性，并给出了板刚性的充分条件
AI.motivation: 研究Kirchhoff-Love非线性板模型解的存在性问题，特别是当板具有刚性特性时。先前Rabier的工作要求板在整个边界上被夹持，本文旨在推广这一结果
AI.techniques: 使用非线性弹性理论、变分方法、应变张量分析，以及刚性条件的数学刻画
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明Kirchhoff-Love非线性板模型在任意施加力和边界条件下解的存在性；2. 给出数据充分条件确保板的刚性特性
AI.significance: 显著推广了Rabier的存在性定理，去除了整个边界夹持的限制，为非线性板理论提供了更一般的数学基础

title: Exponential Lower Bounds for the Advection-Diffusion Equation with Shear Flows
summary: In this paper, we prove that the $L^2$ norm of spatial mean-free solutions to the advection--diffusion equation on $\mathbb{T}^2$ with shear drifts satisfies an \emph{exponential lower bound} in time. This lower bound shows that diffusion can fundamentally suppress passive-scalar mixing.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维环面上具有剪切漂移的平流-扩散方程空间平均零解L²范数满足指数时间下界，揭示了扩散对被动标量混合的抑制作用
AI.motivation: 研究被动标量在剪切流中的混合问题，特别关注扩散对混合速率的影响。传统观点认为扩散促进混合，但本文探讨扩散可能抑制混合的机制
AI.techniques: 使用剪切流变换、Fourier分析、特征函数展开和能量估计方法，通过构造合适的测试函数和渐近分析证明指数下界
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在二维环面上，具有剪切漂移的平流-扩散方程空间平均零解的L²范数满足指数时间下界：存在常数C>0使得\|θ(t)\|_{L²} ≥ C exp(-λt)，其中λ与扩散系数相关
AI.significance: 揭示了扩散对被动标量混合的抑制作用，挑战了扩散促进混合的传统直觉，对流体混合理论、湍流输运和反应扩散过程有重要理论意义

title: Small-amplitude self-similar solutions for one-dimensional nonlinear dispersive equations
summary: Given a nonlinear dispersive equation which admits a scaling invariance, there may exist self-similar solutions. In this work, we present a systematic approach for the construction of small-amplitude self-similar solutions, together with precise asymptotic descriptions at both small and large frequency scales. These ideas are then applied to three classic dispersive models: the modified Benjamin-Ono, the quartic Korteweg-de Vries and the cubic nonlinear Schrödinger equations.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种系统构造小振幅自相似解的方法，并应用于三个经典色散模型
AI.motivation: 非线性色散方程通常具有尺度不变性，可能存在自相似解，但构造小振幅自相似解需要系统方法
AI.techniques: 系统构造方法，小频率和大频率尺度的渐近分析，应用于具体模型的验证
AI.main_theorems: 建立了小振幅自相似解的系统构造框架，给出了精确的渐近描述，并在三个经典方程中得到验证
AI.significance: 为非线性色散方程的自相似解研究提供了系统工具，加深了对尺度不变性和渐近行为的理解

title: Transition and Stability of 3D MHD Around Couette Flow
summary:
We study the three-dimensional incompressible magnetohydrodynamic (MHD) equations near Couette flow with a constant magnetic field perpendicular to the shear plane. Couette flow induces mixing and generates magnetic induction, while the constant magnetic field stabilizes $z$-dependent modes. In contrast, the $z$-averaged magnetic field exhibits algebraic growth. Letting $μ$ denote the inverse fluid and magnetic Reynolds numbers, we analyze how $μ$ governs stability thresholds in Sobolev spaces.
  We identify a nonlinear transient-growth regime characterized by the sharp threshold $5/6\le γ\le 1 $. For $x$-average-free initial data of size $μ^γ$, solutions are nonlinearly stable; however, for certain initial data, the solution departs from the linear dynamics at rate $μ^{γ-1}$ due to a first-order nonlinear instability. The exponent $γ= 5/6$ is optimal for the associated energy functional and cannot be improved in Sobolev spaces without secondary transient-growth mechanisms. Below this threshold, solutions necessarily transition away from the linear dynamics at a minimal rate.
  As a consequence, the $3d$ results yield sharp Sobolev stability thresholds for the $2d$ MHD equations around Couette flow without a constant magnetic field. In particular, the threshold is strictly larger than in prior $2d$ results with a constant field, revealing destabilizing effects normally suppressed by a constant magnetic field. Crucially, this stabilization is restricted to the direction of the magnetic field.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了三维不可压缩磁流体动力学方程在Couette流附近的稳定性，揭示了非线性瞬态增长机制和最优稳定性阈值。
AI.motivation: 研究三维不可压缩MHD方程在Couette流附近的稳定性问题，Couette流诱导混合和磁感应，而垂直于剪切平面的恒定磁场稳定z相关模式，但z平均磁场呈现代数增长。主要关注逆流体和磁雷诺数μ如何控制Sobolev空间中的稳定性阈值。
AI.techniques: 使用Sobolev空间分析、非线性稳定性理论、瞬态增长机制分析、能量泛函方法、线性与非线性动力学比较、阈值优化分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 识别出非线性瞬态增长机制，其尖锐阈值范围为5/6≤γ≤1；2. 对于大小为μ^γ的x平均自由初始数据，解是非线性稳定的；3. 对于某些初始数据，解以速率μ^{γ-1}偏离线性动力学；4. γ=5/6是相关能量泛函的最优值，在Sobolev空间中无法改进；5. 低于此阈值时，解必然以最小速率偏离线性动力学。
AI.significance: 为三维MHD方程在Couette流附近的稳定性提供了精确的Sobolev空间阈值，揭示了恒定磁场的稳定作用仅限于磁场方向，并将三维结果应用于二维MHD方程，发现无恒定磁场时的稳定性阈值严格大于有磁场时，揭示了通常被恒定磁场抑制的去稳定效应。

title: Derivation of the Monokinetic Vlasov-Stokes equations
summary: We consider a microscopic model of spherical particles with inertia in a Stokes flow. As the particle number grows to infinity and their size goes to zero we derive the monokinetic Vlasov-Stokes equations as mean-field limit. We do this under the assumption that the particles have initial velocities given by a Lipschitz velocity profile and prove the mean-field limit for times of the order of the inverse Lipschitz constant. Notably this is not a perturbative result. In particular, we do not require the inertia of the particles to vanish in the limit. Thereby the result improves upon the perturbative derivation in [HS23] in the case of a monokinetic limit density.

AI.tldr: 建立了微观惯性粒子在Stokes流中的平均场极限，推导出单动能Vlasov-Stokes方程
AI.motivation: 研究微观球形粒子在Stokes流中的动力学行为，当粒子数量趋于无穷大且尺寸趋于零时，从微观模型推导宏观连续介质方程
AI.techniques: 平均场极限方法、非微扰分析、Lipschitz连续性假设、单动能密度近似
AI.main_theorems: 在初始速度满足Lipschitz速度剖面的假设下，证明了在Lipschitz常数倒数的时间尺度上，微观模型收敛到单动能Vlasov-Stokes方程
AI.significance: 改进了之前HS23的微扰结果，允许粒子惯性在极限中不消失，为非微扰平均场极限理论提供了新范例

title: Restriction of eigenfunctions on products of spheres to submanifolds of maximal flats
summary: Let $M$ be a product of rank-one symmetric spaces of compact type, each of dimension at least $3$. We establish sharp $L^p$ bounds for the restriction of Laplace--Beltrami eigenfunctions on $M$ to arbitrary submanifolds contained in a maximal flat, for all $p \ge 2$. The proof combines precise asymptotics of Jacobi polynomials and positivity of Fourier coefficients of spherical functions.

AI.tldr: 建立了乘积流形上拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米特征函数在极大平坦子流形中任意子流形上的尖锐L^p限制估计
AI.motivation: 研究乘积流形（紧型秩1对称空间的乘积）上拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米特征函数的限制问题，特别关注特征函数在极大平坦子流形中任意子流形上的L^p估计，这是调和分析和几何分析中的重要问题
AI.techniques: 结合雅可比多项式的精确渐近分析和球面函数的傅里叶系数正性，通过精确的渐近估计和正性论证建立尖锐的L^p界限
AI.main_theorems: 对于所有p≥2，建立了乘积流形上拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米特征函数在极大平坦子流形中任意子流形上的尖锐L^p限制估计
AI.significance: 该结果为乘积流形上的特征函数限制问题提供了完整的L^p理论框架，结合了特殊函数渐近分析和调和分析技术，对几何分析和偏微分方程理论有重要意义
